name: Chickpeas

pros.title: strong all-round legume profile
pros.explanation: Fibre, minerals, and useful protein all show up well enough to make it a very solid category food.

pros.title: easy to use across lots of meals
pros.explanation: Works in bowls, curries, salads, hummus, and snacks.

pros.title: pretty filling and steady
pros.explanation: Useful as a practical staple rather than just a niche health food.

cons.title: sugar is a bit high for the category
cons.explanation: Not a disaster, but it is less clean than the best legumes on this axis.

cons.title: can be rough on some people digestively
contains some anti-nutrients
cons.explanation: Phytates may reduce mineral uptake somewhat.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
